name: Good Reasons Italian Dressing
recipeIngredient: 1 envelope cream of chicken soup mix
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all dry ingredients in a jar or bowl.
2. Store the mixture covered at room temperature.
3. For dressing, combine vinegar, water, oil, and 2 ounces of the dry mixture in a separate container.
4. Shake well to mix all ingredients thoroughly.
